lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, look at that broken part. Let me take it off you.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, look at those broken parts. Let me take them off you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got the [item]!

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh? How did you get across the cavern?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I got there and back by swinging across the cavern with a crossbow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I got there and back by balancing on cables and things.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, well, I'll give you a few tips about how to do that more easily.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you need any more help?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: I always need more help. This power station is always breaking.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: At the moment, I need a [first item] and a [second item]. If you could get either one I'd appreciate it.

sections.title: Using the wrong part on Turgall

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Thanks, but I've got plenty of those. At the moment I need a [Item] and a [Item].

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, look at that broken part. Let me take it off you.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, look at those broken parts. Let me take them off you.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh! Hello, surface-dweller. Do you think you could help me?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh! Hello, surface-dweller. Do you think you could help me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What help?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: This power station keeps breaking. I can fix it easily with parts from the old power generator on the other side of the cavern, but that's not easy to get to.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Do you think you could get something from there for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Excellent! Now, at the moment, I need a [first item] and a [second item]. If you could get either one I'd appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Get it youself!

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Alright, I'm sure someone else will help me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, this is, um, the power station. It converts heat from the lava into magical energy, which powers the lights in the city.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does it work?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: By magic!

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: The lava heats water into steam, which drives a turbine around. The turbine contains magical stones.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: As the magical stones rotate they generate a magical current in the conductor cables, and that powers the light!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is it outside the city?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: We're hardly going to let flowing lava inside the city, are we?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: But don't worry, it's quite safe. The creatures on the cavern floor can't get up here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are there cables all over the cavern?

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh...they deliver power from the old power station.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: There was an accident with that power station and it stopped working, so we set this one up instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Turgall
lines.text: Oh, er, bye.
